chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3972 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16279/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1, 2 and 3 3. For order on Misc. No.16280/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 27.8.2025 Mr. Muhammad Akbar Awan advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. This is a petition for quashment of FIR No.108 of 2025, registered under Sections 354-A/504/420 PPC at Police Station Baldia Town, Karachi. Learned counsel for the petitioner has not made any ground for quashment of the FIR. The Investigating Officer of FIR No.108 of 2025 shall conduct the inquiry under the said FIR impartially and strictly in accordance with law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Investigating Officer of FIR No.108 of 2025, registered under Sections 354-A/504/420 PPC at Police Station Baldia Town, Karachi and the SSP Karachi West, who shall ensure compliance of this order. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
